_meta.method: Searched Plum Village international sangha directory, Wake Up network, Kwan Um School of Zen center listings, and global Zen/Buddhist directories for Kenya; no affiliated Zen centers in the specified lineages were found.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified Plum Village, Kwan Um, or AZI Zen groups with published Kenyan addresses).
knownGaps: Theravāda or non-sectarian mindfulness groups may reference Thich Nhat Hanh's books, but there is no evidence of formal Plum Village or Kwan Um affiliation with a fixed zendo space in Kenya as of 2026.
Smaller informal meditation circles using Zoom or private homes are not listed in international directories and therefore are absent.
